scripts.build: tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --external react --external react-dom --external clsx --external tailwind-merge --external class-variance-authority --external @radix-ui/react-slot --external lucide-react --external @tanstack/react-form --external @tanstack/form-core --external @tanstack/react-store && bunx tailwindcss -i ./src/styles.css -o ./dist/index.css --minify
scripts.dev: bunx tailwindcss -i ./src/styles.css -o ./dist/index.css --watch & bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --external react --external react-dom --external clsx --external tailwind-merge --external class-variance-authority --external @radix-ui/react-slot --external lucide-react --external @tanstack/react-form --external @tanstack/form-core --external @tanstack/react-store --watch
